mapper.select: /** UsptStdrChargerDao.selectList */ select usc.stdr_bsns_cd , usc.insider_id , ci.member_nm as insider_nm , ci.position_nm , usc.charger_author_cd , usc.reprsnt_charger , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('DEPT_CD', ci.dept_nm) as dept_nm from uspt_stdr_charger usc inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = usc.insider_id where usc.stdr_bsns_cd = #{stdrBsnsCd} order by usc.charger_author_cd desc, usc.reprsnt_charger
